Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Welcome back. With that, we have all the second-years present.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}So... what exactly are we all here for?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Ah, I had planned to give Yamagishi a tour of the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}But I realized I never actually showed it properly to any of you since you moved in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I apologize for that. I'd like to take this opportunity to make it up to you all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Uh, we've kinda been living here all this time... I think we get the picture by now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If any one of us needs it, it's you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}You do realize if you screw around and break something, you'll get us all in trouble, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It couldn't hurt to do it anyway, just in case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You never know if a certain someone might screw around blind and break something in here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh c'mon, I'm getting by just fine! In fact, I know the place so well I could give you a tour myself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Heh... You'll make a great assistant, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Humor me a bit, won't you? With the increase in members, I'd like to expand our access to facilities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}So what, are we gonna get like... hot springs? Or maybe a casino!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We'll just have to see, now won't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}With that, let's begin. Yamagishi, follow me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Oh, okay! Thank you for setting this up for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}This is the communal kitchen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Whoa, it looks so clean now! I didn't realize the kitchen was so big...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I was planning to do this earlier, but with April's Shadow attack and ensuing investigation, I just couldn't find time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It should be far more accessible now. You're free to use any of the kitchenware here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Do you all cook your own meals?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I've seen Akihiko in here from time to time. As for myself, I can't say I do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}We used to have someone who cooked with some frequency, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Come to think of it, I only ever come here to get hot water. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I guess if you're only cooking for one, it doesn't really save that much money anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}It's hard to use up everything you buy before it goes bad. Might as well just eat out at that point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}If you care about eating a balanced diet, there's no better way than to cook it yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}But it's not as cheap as they make it out to be. It's hard to use everything up before it goes bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Wow, Yukari-chan... Does that mean you know how to cook?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Huh? Oh, I mean... I can do it, I guess, but I'm no chef![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}It's been a while, and I've had my fair share of embarrassments.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}But with a kitchen this big, I think a couple people could work together in here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}We can halve the work, but double the flavor, you know? I should try it next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I invite someone to cook, we could[n]use this kitchen to make something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}This is the lounge... Well, I suppose it requires no further explanation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Wait... Is that a DVD player!? When did that get here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I brought it with me from home. It's a bit of an old model, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}It's no problem at all. It was a broken one to begin with...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But I was able to fix it, so I hoped you all might get some use out of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}If I took it to my room, I'd be watching alone on my laptop. I hoped you all might make better use of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}And besides, I like the colors more when I watch on a CRT.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}The sofas here are pretty comfy. It'd be a perfect place to sit back and watch.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Oh, maybe this would be a good place...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}There are some movies I've been wanting to see, but... I'd rather not watch them alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}What's this? Is Yuka-tan afraid to watch horror flicks?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}It's quite a shocker to see your soft side... Hard to imagine you're even the same person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}And what exactly is that supposed to mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Uh... Wait, what did I say? I take it back! I didn't mean anything by it, I swear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}You've got some nerve, Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}You'd better watch your back next time we go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Um, Yukari-chan? You're kind of scaring me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I could probably watch a[n]DVD with someone here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}That wraps up the first floor. Let's move up to the next.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Are we allowed to borrow those books on the shelf in the back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Those books were donated by residents of the dorm. I peruse them from time to time myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}This area's pretty sweet. Nice and quiet, and lemme tell ya, those chairs are soft.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}When I cozy up here with a good book, I end up reading way late into the night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}Hehe, I think manga is a respectable form of literature. Maybe I'll try reading here as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}People are always coming and going from the lounge, so I could see this place being less distracting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I'd be able to focus[n]and read a book here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Please, utilize it however you'd like. Any piece of literature is a means of broadening one's horizons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}When you finish a manga, put it back on the shelf. I don't want to see them piled up on tables and chairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}Geez... {f 4 1}-kun, keep an eye on Junpei so he doesn't make a mess of this place.[n]{f 1 1}
